query:
SELECT
            cm.id AS "id!",
            cm.content,
            cm.role,
            cm.model,
            COALESCE(
                (
                    SELECT json_agg(
                        json_build_object(
                            'entity_type', ca."entity_type",
                            'entity_id', ca."entity_id"::TEXT
                        )
                    )
                    FROM "ChatAttachment" ca
                    WHERE ca."messageId" = cm.id
                ),
                '[]'::json
            ) AS attachments
        FROM
            "ChatMessage" cm
        WHERE
            cm."chatId" = $1
        ORDER BY
            cm."createdAt" ASC
